TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-lyen-T.G.Mu-tun "Wiliam T.G. Morton, 1819 a mihcs 8śúą8 śó•¬≠-1868ŚĻī7śúą15śó•",Amilika ngipenay a misaydang, 1946 a mihca i cacay pabinawlan tu picici'an tu ngipen pacumuden niza ku yi-mi, namahiza pala u ayzaay a ziday nu saayaway misanga'ay tu mibulsenay. Ś®ĀŚĽČ¬∑T¬∑G¬∑Ťéęť†ď(William T.G. Morton,1819ŚĻī8śúą8śó•‚ÄĒ1868ŚĻī7śúą15 . nilaculan uyzasa makayniay hakiya nu saayaway pacumud tu picici'an tu yi-mi, makay Mu-tun a nipakatineng malaheci ku nisanga'an tu sapibulsen a micici' nu lingatu, pasu mikakadumay ci How-le-s-Wi-al atu ci Ha-bu pasumana'ay ci Ca-al-s.T. Cye-kesun katuud ku musakamu situngus tu misanga', sabeleng amisaliwyuk tu picici'an nu pibulsen malaalaw tu teked a situngus. Mu-tun lecuh i Amilika Ma-say-cu-say-cow Ca-al-tu a tuse. masakapahenay ciniza i P-al a Mu-ngipen a padekuab minanan. 1842 a mihca malingatu mala misaydan nu ngipen-ke. katukuh 1843 a mihca laed a demiad. u pikakaan cinizaan tu atui' a misayda nu ngipen-ke makakadum ci How-le-s.Wi-al-s, ci Wi-al-s sakay pibelsen manamuh, nika i 1843 a mihca tu zikuzan , sazikuz malatusa misakakukaku tu. . cacay tu a mihaan, ci Wi-al-s mitanam tu i-ya-how-al-tan "syaw-ci" mala u sapibulsen, Kang-nay-ti-kek-ha-te-bu-te a picici'an malahciay tu, saca i Pu-s-tun ciniza pabinawlan paazih caay kalaheci. šłÄŚĻīŚĺĆ, . Ca-al-s .T. Cye-kek-sun u katinengan ni Mu-tu a misaydan atu ke-sya-cya, misabalucu' ci Mu-tunan mitanam miyung tu yi-mi. yi-mi i ayaw nu tulu lasubu a mihcaan matineng tu sipabulsenay tu, uyzasa i ayaw ni Mu-tu, u yi-mi caay henay kayung i tatenga'ay nu hekalay a picici'. piazih ni Mu-tun, u yi-mi hakay u sakapahay a sapibulsen. ayawen niza ku aadupan "pasu nipahabayan niza tu aadupan" atu mitananm tu uzip niza.1846 a mihcaan 9 a bulad 30 a demiad, ci Ay-pen.Bu-low-s belut micumud tu picici'an ni Mu-tun maydih papibubuc tu ngipen, maydih a tadeng masusud ku adadad nu pibubuc tu ngipen a pingaay. pahedupen ni Mu-tun ciniza tu yi-mi a malingatu micici', yu sinakatinengan tu ci Bow-low-s-te hawsa, caay katineng tu adada. namakayni maazih tu ni Mu-tun ku kalaheci. Pow-s-tun a sinbunan i saka tusa a demiad sakay picicic' sakamu satu, nika caay kalilid maazih nu katuuday. . ci Mu-tun misalunguc ci Pow-s-tun-ma-sa-cu-say-cow pulunng nu padekuan matenesay balakiay tu way-ke a misaydan ci Ye-han.C.Wa-lun pow-se makakadum, ayaw nu katuuday a misaydan mipaazih tu pabulsen ni Mu-tun a kawaw, Wa-lun pow-se misulul tu. 1846 a mihcaan 10 a bulad 16 a demiad tu sananal, ci Mu-tun i padekuad laup sa ku misaydan atu micudaday nuayawan nu imelangay a tademaw ci Ci-al-pow-te.A-pow-te papihedup tu yi-mi, zumasatu ci Wa-lun-pow-s miala patahkal tu ailucay a pucu'. Pawacay silaheciay ku mibelsenay, uyni pipaazih kasednun mapatahkal nu katuuday a sinbuyan. i picici'an tu pinaay a demiad ni A-pow-te, ci Mu-tun aci Cye-kek-sun misinsi tu cacay teked nu uzipay. uyzasa ci Mu-tun caay katenes macaculi tu kasitungus tu nu tekeday. sazikuzay i huing yadah ku nipalawpes tu kalisiw, caay pakay nu uzipay a nisanga'an a pakala tu nabalucu'an a nipaini. 1862 a mihcaan balangbangan nuuzip a pilihiza micumud tu Pow-tow-ma-ke a sakapuy nu hitay. u tineng niza tu nalimaan tu sapibulsen yungen niza i uzip nu tusa malebut a hitay i kalahitayan nu Bow-lye-te-li-kek-paw, Cyen-s-le-s-wi-al a kalalais atu Huy-te-ni-s-a kalalais. ciniza i 1868 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 15 a demiad i Niw-ye-cong-yanga aidangan mikisapi' sa mapulin mapatay. tademan i Ma-say-cu-say-cow-cyen-cyaw-se He-san a pitademan.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == wi-r~…ĺj…ôn-t.g.mu-tun "wir~…ĺiam t.g. morton, **** a mińß ¶s *** **-**********",amir~…ĺika Ňčip…ônaj a misajdaŇč, **** a mińß ¶a i ¶a ¶aj pabinawr~…ĺan tu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an tu Ňčip…ôn pa ¶umud…ôn niza ku ji-mi, namańßiza par~…ĺa u ajzaaj a zidaj nu saajawaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu mibur~…ĺs…ônaj. ***t*g***(wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam t.g. morton,******************* . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujzasa makajniaj ńßakija nu saajawaj pa ¶umud tu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an tu ji-mi, makaj mu-tun a nipakatin…ôŇč mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu sapibur~…ĺs…ôn a mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺiŇčatu, pasu mikakadumaj ¶i ńßow-r~…ĺ…ô-s-wi-ar~…ĺ atu ¶i ńßa-bu pasumana Ē~ °aj ¶i ¶a-ar~…ĺ-s.t. ¶j…ô-k…ôsun katuud ku musakamu situŇčus tu misaŇča Ē~ °, sab…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč amisar~…ĺiwjuk tu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an nu pibur~…ĺs…ôn mar~…ĺaar~…ĺaw tu t…ôk…ôd a situŇčus. mu-tun r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i amir~…ĺika ma-saj- ¶u-saj- ¶ow ¶a-ar~…ĺ-tu a tus…ô. masakapańß…ônaj ¶iniza i p-ar~…ĺ a mu-Ňčip…ôn a pad…ôkuab minanan. **** a mińß ¶a mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa misajdan nu Ňčip…ôn-k…ô. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a r~…ĺa…ôd a d…ômiad. u pikakaan ¶inizaan tu atui Ē~ ° a misajda nu Ňčip…ôn-k…ô makakadum ¶i ńßow-r~…ĺ…ô-s.wi-ar~…ĺ-s, ¶i wi-ar~…ĺ-s sakaj pib…ôr~…ĺs…ôn manamuńß, nika i **** a mińß ¶a tu zikuzan , sazikuz mar~…ĺatusa misakakukaku tu. . ¶a ¶aj tu a mińßaan, ¶i wi-ar~…ĺ-s mitanam tu i-ja-ńßow-ar~…ĺ-tan "sjaw- ¶i" mar~…ĺa u sapibur~…ĺs…ôn, kaŇč-naj-ti-k…ôk-ńßa-t…ô-bu-t…ô a pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an mar~…ĺańß ¶iaj tu, sa ¶a i pu-s-tun ¶iniza pabinawr~…ĺan paazińß ¶aaj kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. ***, . ¶a-ar~…ĺ-s .t. ¶j…ô-k…ôk-sun u katin…ôŇčan ni mu-tu a misajdan atu k…ô-sja- ¶ja, misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶i mu-tunan mitanam mijuŇč tu ji-mi. ji-mi i ajaw nu tur~…ĺu r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan matin…ôŇč tu sipabur~…ĺs…ônaj tu, ujzasa i ajaw ni mu-tu, u ji-mi ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kajuŇč i tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °. piazińß ni mu-tun, u ji-mi ńßakaj u sakapańßaj a sapibur~…ĺs…ôn. ajaw…ôn niza ku aadupan "pasu nipańßabajan niza tu aadupan" atu mitananm tu uzip niza.**** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad, ¶i aj-p…ôn.bu-r~…ĺow-s b…ôr~…ĺut mi ¶umud tu pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an ni mu-tun majdińß papibubu ¶ tu Ňčip…ôn, majdińß a tad…ôŇč masusud ku adadad nu pibubu ¶ tu Ňčip…ôn a piŇčaaj. pańß…ôdup…ôn ni mu-tun ¶iniza tu ji-mi a mar~…ĺiŇčatu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °, ju sinakatin…ôŇčan tu ¶i bow-r~…ĺow-s-t…ô ńßawsa, ¶aaj katin…ôŇč tu adada. namakajni maazińß tu ni mu-tun ku kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. pow-s-tun a sinbunan i saka tusa a d…ômiad sakaj pi ¶i ¶i ¶ Ē~ ° sakamu satu, nika ¶aaj kar~…ĺir~…ĺid maazińß nu katuudaj. . ¶i mu-tun misar~…ĺuŇču ¶ ¶i pow-s-tun-ma-sa- ¶u-saj- ¶ow pur~…ĺunŇč nu pad…ôkuan mat…ôn…ôsaj bar~…ĺakiaj tu waj-k…ô a misajdan ¶i j…ô-ńßan. ¶.wa-r~…ĺun pow-s…ô makakadum, ajaw nu katuudaj a misajdan mipaazińß tu pabur~…ĺs…ôn ni mu-tun a kawaw, wa-r~…ĺun pow-s…ô misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu. **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tu sananar~…ĺ, ¶i mu-tun i pad…ôkuad r~…ĺaup sa ku misajdan atu mi ¶udadaj nuajawan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶i-ar~…ĺ-pow-t…ô.a-pow-t…ô papińß…ôdup tu ji-mi, zumasatu ¶i wa-r~…ĺun-pow-s miar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ tu air~…ĺu ¶aj a pu ¶u Ē~ °. pawa ¶aj sir~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj ku mib…ôr~…ĺs…ônaj, ujni pipaazińß kas…ôdnun mapatańßkar~…ĺ nu katuudaj a sinbujan. i pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an tu pinaaj a d…ômiad ni a-pow-t…ô, ¶i mu-tun a ¶i ¶j…ô-k…ôk-sun misinsi tu ¶a ¶aj t…ôk…ôd nu uzipaj. ujzasa ¶i mu-tun ¶aaj kat…ôn…ôs ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi tu kasituŇčus tu nu t…ôk…ôdaj. sazikuzaj i ńßuiŇč jadańß ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj pakaj nu uzipaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an a pakar~…ĺa tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a nipaini. **** a mińß ¶aan bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan nuuzip a pir~…ĺińßiza mi ¶umud tu pow-tow-ma-k…ô a sakapuj nu ńßitaj. u tin…ôŇč niza tu nar~…ĺimaan tu sapibur~…ĺs…ôn juŇč…ôn niza i uzip nu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut a ńßitaj i kar~…ĺańßitajan nu bow-r~…ĺj…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ôk-paw, ¶j…ôn-s-r~…ĺ…ô-s-wi-ar~…ĺ a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais atu ńßuj-t…ô-ni-s-a kar~…ĺar~…ĺais. ¶iniza i **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad i niw-j…ô- ¶oŇč-jaŇča aidaŇčan mikisapi Ē~ ° sa mapur~…ĺin mapataj. tad…ôman i ma-saj- ¶u-saj- ¶ow- ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw-s…ô ńß…ô-san a pitad…ôman.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-lyen-T.G.Mu-tun "Wiliam T.G. Morton, 1819 a mihcs 8śúą8 śó•¬≠-1868ŚĻī7śúą15śó•",Amilika ngipenay a misaydang, 1946 a mihca i cacay pabinawlan tu picici'an tu ngipen pacumuden niza ku yi-mi, namahiza pala u ayzaay a ziday nu saayaway misanga'ay tu mibulsenay. Ś®ĀŚĽČ¬∑T¬∑G¬∑Ťéęť†ď(William T.G. Morton,1819ŚĻī8śúą8śó•‚ÄĒ1868ŚĻī7śúą15 . nilaculan uyzasa makayniay hakiya nu saayaway pacumud tu picici'an tu yi-mi, makay Mu-tun a nipakatineng malaheci ku nisanga'an tu sapibulsen a micici' nu lingatu, pasu mikakadumay ci How-le-s-Wi-al atu ci Ha-bu pasumana'ay ci Ca-al-s.T. Cye-kesun katuud ku musakamu situngus tu misanga', sabeleng amisaliwyuk tu picici'an nu pibulsen malaalaw tu teked a situngus. Mu-tun lecuh i Amilika Ma-say-cu-say-cow Ca-al-tu a tuse. masakapahenay ciniza i P-al a Mu-ngipen a padekuab minanan. 1842 a mihca malingatu mala misaydan nu ngipen-ke. katukuh 1843 a mihca laed a demiad. u pikakaan cinizaan tu atui' a misayda nu ngipen-ke makakadum ci How-le-s.Wi-al-s, ci Wi-al-s sakay pibelsen manamuh, nika i 1843 a mihca tu zikuzan , sazikuz malatusa misakakukaku tu. . cacay tu a mihaan, ci Wi-al-s mitanam tu i-ya-how-al-tan "syaw-ci" mala u sapibulsen, Kang-nay-ti-kek-ha-te-bu-te a picici'an malahciay tu, saca i Pu-s-tun ciniza pabinawlan paazih caay kalaheci. šłÄŚĻīŚĺĆ, . Ca-al-s .T. Cye-kek-sun u katinengan ni Mu-tu a misaydan atu ke-sya-cya, misabalucu' ci Mu-tunan mitanam miyung tu yi-mi. yi-mi i ayaw nu tulu lasubu a mihcaan matineng tu sipabulsenay tu, uyzasa i ayaw ni Mu-tu, u yi-mi caay henay kayung i tatenga'ay nu hekalay a picici'. piazih ni Mu-tun, u yi-mi hakay u sakapahay a sapibulsen. ayawen niza ku aadupan "pasu nipahabayan niza tu aadupan" atu mitananm tu uzip niza.1846 a mihcaan 9 a bulad 30 a demiad, ci Ay-pen.Bu-low-s belut micumud tu picici'an ni Mu-tun maydih papibubuc tu ngipen, maydih a tadeng masusud ku adadad nu pibubuc tu ngipen a pingaay. pahedupen ni Mu-tun ciniza tu yi-mi a malingatu micici', yu sinakatinengan tu ci Bow-low-s-te hawsa, caay katineng tu adada. namakayni maazih tu ni Mu-tun ku kalaheci. Pow-s-tun a sinbunan i saka tusa a demiad sakay picicic' sakamu satu, nika caay kalilid maazih nu katuuday. . ci Mu-tun misalunguc ci Pow-s-tun-ma-sa-cu-say-cow pulunng nu padekuan matenesay balakiay tu way-ke a misaydan ci Ye-han.C.Wa-lun pow-se makakadum, ayaw nu katuuday a misaydan mipaazih tu pabulsen ni Mu-tun a kawaw, Wa-lun pow-se misulul tu. 1846 a mihcaan 10 a bulad 16 a demiad tu sananal, ci Mu-tun i padekuad laup sa ku misaydan atu micudaday nuayawan nu imelangay a tademaw ci Ci-al-pow-te.A-pow-te papihedup tu yi-mi, zumasatu ci Wa-lun-pow-s miala patahkal tu ailucay a pucu'. Pawacay silaheciay ku mibelsenay, uyni pipaazih kasednun mapatahkal nu katuuday a sinbuyan. i picici'an tu pinaay a demiad ni A-pow-te, ci Mu-tun aci Cye-kek-sun misinsi tu cacay teked nu uzipay. uyzasa ci Mu-tun caay katenes macaculi tu kasitungus tu nu tekeday. sazikuzay i huing yadah ku nipalawpes tu kalisiw, caay pakay nu uzipay a nisanga'an a pakala tu nabalucu'an a nipaini. 1862 a mihcaan balangbangan nuuzip a pilihiza micumud tu Pow-tow-ma-ke a sakapuy nu hitay. u tineng niza tu nalimaan tu sapibulsen yungen niza i uzip nu tusa malebut a hitay i kalahitayan nu Bow-lye-te-li-kek-paw, Cyen-s-le-s-wi-al a kalalais atu Huy-te-ni-s-a kalalais. ciniza i 1868 a mihcaan 7 a bulad 15 a demiad i Niw-ye-cong-yanga aidangan mikisapi' sa mapulin mapatay. tademan i Ma-say-cu-say-cow-cyen-cyaw-se He-san a pitademan.

tu Ňčip…ôn pa ¶umud…ôn niza ku ji-mi, namańßiza par~…ĺa u ajzaaj a zidaj nu saajawaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu mibur~…ĺs…ônaj. ***t*g***(wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam t.g. morton,******************* . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujzasa adada. namakajni maazińß tu ni mu-tun ku kar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i. pow-s-tun a sinbunan i saka tusa a d…ômiad sakaj pi ¶i ¶i ¶ Ē~ ° sakamu satu, nika ¶aaj kar~…ĺir~…ĺid maazińß nu katuudaj. . ¶i mu-tun misar~…ĺuŇču ¶ ¶i pow-s-tun-ma-sa- ¶u-saj- ¶ow pur~…ĺunŇč nu pad…ôkuan mat…ôn…ôsaj bar~…ĺakiaj tu waj-k…ô a misajdan ¶i j…ô-ńßan. ¶.wa-r~…ĺun pow-s…ô makakadum, ajaw nu katuudaj a misajdan mipaazińß tu pabur~…ĺs…ôn ni mu-tun a kawaw, wa-r~…ĺun pow-s…ô misur~…ĺur~…ĺ tu. **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad tu sananar~…ĺ, ¶i mu-tun i pad…ôkuad r~…ĺaup sa ku misajdan atu mi ¶udadaj nuajawan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶i-ar~…ĺ-pow-t…ô.a-pow-t…ô papińß…ôdup tu ji-mi, zumasatu ¶i wa-r~…ĺun-pow-s miar~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ tu air~…ĺu ¶aj a pu ¶u Ē~ °. pawa ¶aj sir~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj ku mib…ôr~…ĺs…ônaj, ujni pipaazińß kas…ôdnun mapatańßkar~…ĺ nu katuudaj a sinbujan. i pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °an tu pinaaj a d…ômiad ni a-pow-t…ô, ¶i mu-tun a ¶i ¶j…ô-k…ôk-sun misinsi tu ¶a ¶aj t…ôk…ôd nu uzipaj. ujzasa ¶i mu-tun ¶aaj kat…ôn…ôs ma ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi tu kasituŇčus tu nu t…ôk…ôdaj. sazikuzaj i ńßuiŇč jadańß ku nipar~…ĺawp…ôs tu kar~…ĺisiw, ¶aaj pakaj nu uzipaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an a pakar~…ĺa tu nabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °an a nipaini. **** a mińß ¶aan bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan nuuzip a pir~…ĺińßiza mi ¶umud tu pow-tow-ma-k…ô a sakapuj nu ńßitaj. u tin…ôŇč niza tu nar~…ĺimaan tu sapibur~…ĺs…ôn juŇč…ôn niza i uzip nu tusa
